r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: Prescription digestion drugs (PPIs) are safe for long-term use
relatability_triggers: Drug company execs are nervous. That's because the greatest health advance in decades has hit the streets.

s_specific_solution.core_mechanism: : The secret to Aloe Cure's 'health adjusting' formula is scientifically tested Acemannan, a polysaccharide extracted from Aloe Vera. But not the same aloe vera that mom used to apply to your cuts, scrapes and burns. This is a perfect strain of aloe that is organically grown in special Asian soil; under very strict conditions. Aloe Cure is so powerful it begins to benefit your health the instant you take it. It soothes intestinal discomfort and you can avoid the possibility of bone and health damage caused by overuse of digestion drugs.
mechanism_proof_points: Dr. Liza Leal - integrative health specialist from Texas
News reports on kidney failure and PPIs
unique_differentiators: Acemannan polysaccharide from special Asian-grown organic aloe

headline.main_headline: Drug Companies Fear Release of the New Aloe Cure
headline.subheadline: Big Pharma stands to lose billions as doctors recommend drug-free 'health cocktail' that adjusts and corrects your body's health conditions.
headline.deck_copy: Doctors call it 'The greatest health discovery in decades!'

promise_compression.core_promise_in_headline: Natural cure that threatens pharmaceutical profits

curiosity_architecture.curiosity_gap: What is this aloe cure that Big Pharma fears?

schema_analysis.expectation_violated: Health ads typically promote products. This frames product as threat to powerful industry.
schema_analysis.conventional_alternative: New Natural Supplement Helps With Digestion

emotional_engineering.emotional_trajectory: Anger at Big Pharma → Hope that there's an alternative → Desire to 'stick it' to drug companies

formula_pattern.formula_variation: Combines 'powerful entity fears' with 'new cure' for maximum intrigue

headline_lead_connection.lead_continuation: Lead expands on the threat to Big Pharma profits
headline_lead_connection.headline_callback_in_lead: Analysts expect it to put a huge crimp in 'Big Pharma' profits

lead.hook_sentence: Drug company execs are nervous. That's because the greatest health advance in decades has hit the streets.
lead.full_text: Drug company execs are nervous. That's because the greatest health advance in decades has hit the streets. And analysts expect it to put a huge crimp in 'Big Pharma' profits. So what's all the fuss about? It's about a new ingredient that's changing the lives of people who use it. Some call it 'the greatest discovery since penicillin'! And others call it 'a miracle!' The name of the product is the Aloe Cure. It's not a drug. It's something completely different. And the product is available to anyone who wants it, at a reasonable price. But demands may force future prices to rise.
lead.transition_to_body: Doctor warning about digestion drugs creates bridge to mechanism

curiosity_progression.amplified_gap: What is this discovery that's 'greatest since penicillin'?

schema_analysis.expectation_violated: Leads typically focus on consumer benefit. This leads with industry threat.

But not the same aloe vera that mom used to apply to your cuts, scrapes and burns. This is a perfect strain of aloe that is organically grown in special Asian soil; under very strict conditions. Aloe Cure is so powerful it begins to benefit your health the instant you take it. It soothes intestinal discomfort and you can avoid the possibility of bone and health damage caused by overuse of digestion drugs.

primary_promise.statement: Natural digestion relief without dangerous prescription drugs

promise_architecture.promise_ceiling: Greatest health discovery in decades - like penicillin

three_part_structure.what_they_think: Prescription digestion drugs (PPIs) are safe for long-term use
three_part_structure.what_it_really_is: PPIs cause bone fractures, kidney failure, heart attack risk, and brain fog
three_part_structure.why_nothing_worked: Drug companies profit from keeping you on dangerous drugs; natural alternatives suppressed

villain_profile.villain_mechanism: Profit from dangerous drugs, fear natural alternatives that threaten their business

root_cause_architecture.blame_transfer: From 'you have a digestive problem' to 'drug companies have been profiting by keeping you sick'
countersells: PPIs - bone fractures, kidney failure, heart risk

narrative_reorganization.self_blame_removal: You're not sick because you're broken - you're sick because drug companies profit from your illness
narrative_reorganization.coherence_creation: Connects all the health problems (digestion, memory, sleep, kidneys) to one villain (Big Pharma)
narrative_reorganization.new_self_concept: Rebel against pharmaceutical establishment, taking back health control

proof_elements.claim_supported: PPIs cause bone fractures with long-term use
proof_elements.verbatim_text: In a nutshell, the FDA statement warned people should avoid taking these digestion drugs for longer than three 14-day treatment periods because there is an increased risk of bone fractures.

proof_elements.claim_supported: Chronic PPI use increases heart attack risk
proof_elements.verbatim_text: In June of 2015 a major study shows that chronic PPI use increases the risk of heart attack in general population.
National and local news outlets are reporting Kidney Failure linked to PPI's.

proof_elements.source: Dr. Liza Leal, integrative health specialist, Texas
proof_elements.claim_supported: Recommends Aloe Cure before prescribing any digestion drug
proof_elements.verbatim_text: Dr. Liza Leal; a leading integrative health specialist out of Texas recommends Aloe Cure before she decides to prescribe any digestion drug.

proof_elements.claim_supported: Eliminated indigestion after 40 years of suffering
proof_elements.verbatim_text: I'm always in 'indigestion hell'. Doctors put me on all sorts of antacid remedies. Nothing worked. One day a friend said, 'Why don't you try Aloe Cure'. I was shocked! I decided to experiment. I stopped taking the PPIs altogether and replaced it with a daily diet of Aloe Cure. Then something remarkable happened - NOTHING! Not even the slightest hint of indigestion. For the first time in 40 years I didn't need pills or tablets to avoid indigestion.

gaps_identified: No clinical studies on Aloe Cure itself

metadata.extraction_notes: Big Pharma villain narrative. Native newspaper format. Uses Ralph Burns testimonial from Confessions piece.

fssit_candidates.statement: Many people take them daily and for decades.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Validates that readers have been unknowingly putting themselves at risk

fssit_candidates.statement: The Recommended treatment for Prilosec, Prevacid, and all other PPIs is only 14 days - some people take them for 14 years!
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Explains why their long-term use was dangerous - they were never meant for it

rsf_analysis.fssit_placement_pattern: Lead and early body sections contain key validation moments

temporal_analysis.cultural_moment_reference: Growing distrust of pharmaceutical industry, FDA warning awareness
evergreen_elements: Fear of prescription drug side effects

extraction_quality.notes: Source file contains newspaper layout artifacts (election debate story). Core advertorial content extracted. Uses same Ralph Burns testimonial as Confessions piece - likely same campaign.
